prompt: A photorealistic image of {argument name="confident person" default="Sam Altman"} standing confidently on the left with his hands on his hips, wearing a black t-shirt with white text that reads "{argument name="shirt text" default="i ship faster than you code."}". Next to him on the right is {argument name="dejected person" default="Sundar Pichai"}, looking dejected and sad with his head bowed and hands clasped, wearing a plain dark grey t-shirt. They are standing indoors in front of a large glass window. Outside the window is a sunny corporate campus with trees, a small pond, and a modern glass building with the {argument name="background company logo" default="Google"} logo prominently displayed on it.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的图片，左侧是 {argument name="person 1" default="Sam Altman"}，他双手叉腰，自信地站立着，身穿一件黑色 T 恤，上面用打字机字体印着“{argument name="shirt text" default="i ship faster than you code."}”。在他右侧的是 {argument name="person 2" default="Sundar Pichai"}，他戴着眼镜，穿着一件朴素的深灰色 T 恤，表情沮丧、失落且低头看着地面，双手紧张地交握在身前。他们站在室内，旁边是巨大的落地窗。窗外的背景中可以看到一个阳光明媚的科技公司园区，建筑上印有巨大的“{argument name="background logo" default="Google"}”标志，周围还有树木和一个小池塘。

breakdown.creativeCore: 科技公司 CEO 对决梗图：生成一张写实且具有讽刺意味的图片，展示两个姿态对比鲜明的人物（一个自信，一个沮丧），并支持自定义 T 恤文字和背景品牌标识。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
